meta.title: Time to Restore a Constitutional Congress
meta.description: Hudson Institute Distinguished Fellow Christopher DeMuth  discussed his path-breaking article on this subject— A  Constitutional Congress? —with a panel including former  Senator Don Nickles of Oklahoma. Hudson Institute Senior  Fellow Arthur Herman moderated the discussion. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
